name: jarvis
description: Neuro-graph variant: **Today** view, **single-memory focus**, and **record** to talk to JARVIS. Full-screen JARVIS video plays while you record; audio (and optional transcript) is saved to the local filesystem.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const hook='scripts/setup-jarvis-git-hooks.js';if(fs.existsSync(hook)){cp.execFileSync('node',[hook],{stdio:'inherit'});}else{console.log('[postinstall] setup-jarvis-git-hooks.js not found, skipping.');}"
scripts.dev:server: VOICE_PORT=${VOICE_PORT:-18923} nodemon --watch jarvis-server.js --watch vite.config.js --ext js,cjs,mjs,json --signal SIGTERM jarvis-server.js
